summary: Comprehensive testing of P0 Full Wiring Audit and P1 Partner Cost Request Notifications for Konekt B2B platform. Backend: 19/21 tests passed (90%). Frontend: All critical flows verified working. Minor data quality issues found in test data (payer_name fallback to '-' for some records).

minor.issue: Some records have payer_name as '-' (fallback value) - this is expected for test data without payer info
Some orders have customer_name as None - likely test data created without customer info

critical_code_review_comments: Payment Queue status normalization working correctly - 'pending'/'pending_verification' mapped to 'uploaded'
Admin Orders table shows all required columns: Date, Order #, Customer, Payer, Total, Payment, Fulfillment
Customer Orders API returns enriched fields: payment_status_label, fulfillment_status, customer_status, payer_name
Customer Invoices API returns enriched fields: payer_name, payment_status_label, total_amount
Service Tasks stats endpoint returns proper counts with all expected fields
Partner notifications working with clickable target_url links
test_credentials: Admin: admin@konekt.co.tz / KnktcKk_L-hw1wSyquvd!, Customer: demo.customer@konekt.com / Demo123!, Partner: demo.partner@konekt.com / Partner123!
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Full Wiring Audit verified. Payment Queue shows all required fields (customer_name, payer_name, payer_phone, source, amount, status). Status normalization working (pending/pending_verification → uploaded). Admin Orders table compact with all columns. Customer Orders/Invoices APIs return enriched fields. Service Tasks stats/overdue endpoints working. Partner notifications with clickable target_url verified.

backend_endpoints: GET /api/admin/payments/queue - returns list with all required fields, status normalization working
GET /api/admin/orders-ops - returns list with enriched payer_name, customer_name
GET /api/admin/orders-ops/{id} - returns enriched order detail with payer_name waterfall
GET /api/customer/orders - returns orders with payment_status_label, fulfillment_status, customer_status, payer_name
GET /api/customer/invoices - returns invoices with payer_name, payment_status_label, total_amount
GET /api/admin/invoices - returns invoices with customer_name, payer_name, payment_status_label
GET /api/admin/service-tasks/stats/summary - returns proper counts (assigned, awaiting_cost, cost_submitted, in_progress, completed, delayed, failed, unassigned, total)
GET /api/admin/service-tasks/overdue-costs - returns empty or valid list of overdue tasks
frontend_features: Admin Payments Queue page - table with Date, Invoice, Customer, Payer, Source, Amount, Status columns
Admin Payments Queue - status tabs showing Total (100), Pending (40), Approved (50), Rejected (10)
Admin Payments Queue drawer - Payer Details section, Customer/Account section, Invoice/Reference section, Payment Proof preview, Approve/Reject actions
Admin Orders page - table with Date, Order #, Customer, Payer, Total, Payment, Fulfillment columns
Admin Orders drawer - Order Summary, Customer, Assignment, Payment, Fulfillment, Status Timeline sections
Customer Orders page - table with Date, Order No, Source, Amount, Payment, Status, Action columns
Customer Invoices page - table with Date, Invoice No, Type, Amount, Payer Name, Payment Status columns
Partner Dashboard - Notification bell with clickable notifications that navigate to target_url
Partner Assigned Work page - KPI cards (Assigned, Awaiting Cost, In Progress, Completed, Delayed) and task table

api_tests_failed: test_payment_queue_fields_not_blank - Some records have payer_name as '-' (expected fallback for test data)
test_admin_orders_table_fields - Some orders have customer_name as None (test data issue)
